hero.subtitle: We carry out seed ball planting with drone technology. Thanks to unmanned aerial vehicles, we reduce land disturbance to zero and preserve wildlife on steep terrain.

valueCards.subtitle: A measurable and sustainable reforestation system built on three core principles.

zeroFootprint.title: Zero Ground Footprint
zeroFootprint.description: We green nature with technology. Using drone technology, we carry out seed ball planting operations. With unmanned aerial vehicles, we reduce land disturbance to zero and preserve wildlife in steep terrain.

transparentSupply.title: Transparent Supply Chain
transparentSupply.description: Our regionally-suited seeds are sourced from the relevant Regional Forestry Directorates; species, collection dates, and origin of every seed are securely verified by blockchain technology.

annualReport.title: Annual Drone Reporting
annualReport.description: Periodic flight data, growth metrics and your carbon neutralization results are updated live on our corporate dashboard and can be exported directly to your ESG reports.

valueCards.titleLine1: We are Pushing Past the Limits of

howItWorks.title: Four Steps to
howItWorks.subtitle: End-to-end science and technology, from seed selection to ESG reporting.

research.title: Seed Ball R&D
research.description: We work with our expert forest engineers and academic advisors to drive ecosystem restoration and the rehabilitation of burned areas and mining sites. We develop our seed ball formulas in line with forestry science — selecting seeds suited to the region's climate and ecology and coating them with the most appropriate materials.

analysis.title: Target Site Analysis
analysis.description: Our application analyses satellite and drone (UAV) imagery to study the site's topography, soil moisture and ecosystem structure. It uses artificial intelligence to determine the most suitable target points for seed ball drops. Coordinated with the Regional Forestry Directorate, all legal permits are obtained to make the afforestation process fully scientific and safe.

distribution.title: Drone Distribution
distribution.description: Guided by high-precision GPS data, our UAV fleet delivers 200+ seed balls in a single flight to pre-optimized target points — flawlessly and with zero ecological impact.

monitoring.title: Annual Monitoring & ESG
monitoring.description: Vegetation growth data tracked through annual UAV photogrammetry and real-time carbon offset metrics on the corporate dashboard are available instantly. Ready to be integrated into ESG reporting workflows.

impactTabs.subtitle: We create measurable change in three critical ecosystem domains, powered by science and technology.

fire.label: Post-Fire
fire.title: Regreening Burned Forests
fire.description: To restore the ecological dynamics of burned forest land, we run large-scale, fast and sustainable reforestation campaigns using autonomous drone fleets and high-germination seed balls.
bullets: Worker safety: Avoids risking lives on loose, landslide-prone terrain after fires
Golden time window: Rapid intervention before topsoil loses nutrients or erosion begins
GIS-driven homogeneous distribution: Seed density per m² is finely tuned
Digital traceability: Every coordinate is logged, germination is monitored from satellites
fire.detailIntro: The scientific foundation of UAV + seed ball rehabilitation in burned areas:

items.title: Labor Savings
items.description: Work that would take hundreds of laborers weeks of manual planting is completed by autonomous drone fleets in a fraction of the time.

items.title: Worker Safety
items.description: Planting is carried out on loose post-fire soil, fallen trees and landslide-prone terrain without putting human lives at risk.

items.title: Protective Coating
items.description: The clay, compost and nutrients inside seed balls shield the seed from birds, rodents and ants.

items.title: Micro-Habitat Support
items.description: The seed ball carries the moisture and organic nutrients needed for germination right in its first layer.

items.title: Natural Adaptation
items.description: Because seeds are not buried deep in the soil, they germinate at the right time and in their natural cycle, together with the rain.

items.title: Speed and Wide-Area Coverage
items.description: A single drone can drop thousands of seed balls homogeneously over a wide hectarage in a day.

items.title: Lower Cost
items.description: Optimizes reforestation budgets by removing seedling growing, transport, hole digging and planting labor costs.

items.title: Critical Time Management
items.description: Allows fast intervention right after the fire — in the critical "golden window" before the soil loses nutrients and erosion begins.

items.title: GIS and Mapping Integration
items.description: Thanks to 3D maps prepared in advance, seeds are not dropped randomly but placed precisely on micro-basins and moist points where germination probability is highest.

items.title: Homogeneous Distribution
items.description: Sensors and autonomous algorithms finely tune the seed count per m²; over-density or gaps are prevented.

items.title: Digital Traceability
items.description: Since drop coordinates are logged in the system, germination success and vegetation development are easily tracked by satellites or drones in the following months.

detailGroups.title: Maximum Restoration with Minimum Environmental Footprint

items.title: Soil Protection
items.description: Prevents heavy machinery and intense human traffic from compacting the soil, protecting the post-fire sensitive topsoil from erosion.

items.title: Ecosystem-Friendly
items.description: Using only native flora seeds preserves the region's natural gene pool and supports ecological succession without disruption.

mining.label: Mining Sites
mining.title: Ecological Restoration of Mining Sites
mining.description: We accelerate the restoration of sites whose natural structure, vegetation and soil quality have been disturbed by mining. Using remote sensing and AI, we boost vegetation success in degraded topographies, building a gradual and sustainable forest ecosystem.
bullets: 200+ seeds per drone flight — 10× faster than traditional methods
Zero ground footprint: maximum restoration with the smallest environmental footprint
Full transparency: seed species, origin and germination rates logged end-to-end
Annual monitoring: high-resolution digital data via periodic drone flights
Corporate integration: every sale on your e-commerce site flows straight into your ESG reports via API
Legal compliance: 100% compliant, coordinated with Regional Forestry Directorates

carbon.label: Carbon Neutral
carbon.title: End-to-End Carbon Neutrality for Holdings and Companies
carbon.description: We calculate your annual greenhouse gas emissions to international standards, build high-carbon-sink areas (bio-carbon ecosystems) with drone technology, and integrate the entire process transparently into your ESG reports. By providing API integration between our corporate dashboard and your ESG software, we automate the data flow.
bullets: Corporate carbon footprint assessment — to international standards
Brand-dedicated forest, supported by drone technology
Data ready for ESG, GRI, CDP reports — automatic flow via API

meta.title: Our Seeds — Native Species and Their Characteristics
meta.description: The native species we use in Skytech Green seed ball projects: Turkish Red Pine, Black Pine, Cedar and Juniper. Each species' climate adaptation, root system, germination time and ecological role.

ourSeeds.breadcrumbSubtitle: Every seed is selected to suit the region's climate and ecosystem. The characteristics of the four native species used in Skytech Green seed ball projects.
ourSeeds.sectionSubtitle: Each species is chosen according to the climate and soil structure of the region where it is planted. Our seeds are supplied by the Regional Forestry Directorates.
ourSeeds.footnote: Our region-appropriate seeds are sourced from the relevant Regional Forestry Directorates; the species information, the dates the seeds were collected from the trees and their origin details are securely verified with blockchain technology.

kizilcam.name: Turkish Red Pine
kizilcam.climate: Mediterranean climate, resistant to hot, dry summers
kizilcam.ecologicalRole: The first colonizing species after fire. It stabilizes the soil and provides habitat for birds and insects.
kizilcam.description: Our most widespread conifer, covering roughly 25% of Türkiye's forest area. It adapts perfectly to the Mediterranean climate, grows quickly and is known for its ability to regenerate automatically after fire.

karacam.name: Black Pine
karacam.region: Central Anatolia, Western Black Sea, Taurus Mountains
karacam.climate: Continental climate; tolerant of drought and cold
karacam.ecologicalRole: The pioneer species of high-altitude reforestation. It plays a critical role in erosion control and in the steppe–forest transition zone.
karacam.description: A native pine species resilient to the high elevations of Anatolia. Thanks to its tolerance of drought and frost it is used safely in harsh climates; it is known for its long-lived and durable wood.

sedir.name: Cedar (Cedar of Lebanon)
sedir.ecologicalRole: A cornerstone of high-altitude ecosystems. It provides habitat for bird and mammal species.
sedir.description: A symbol of Anatolia and a heritage species with a life span of centuries. It forms pure forests on high mountains; with its resin and distinctive scent it offers high resistance to drought.

ardic.name: Juniper
ardic.region: Across Anatolia, especially the interior regions
ardic.climate: Arid and semi-arid climate, stony soils
ardic.ecologicalRole: A pioneer species on steep, arid slopes. Its berries provide food for birds and wildlife; critical for erosion control.
ardic.description: A resilient native species that adapts to the steep slopes of Anatolia. It grows from the foothills up to the summits; its berries hold nutritional value for the ecosystem, and it is indispensable in the fight against erosion and desertification.

faqSection.subtitle: From seed balls to drone planting, from carbon certificates to corporate integration — everything is here.

seedBall.question: What is a seed ball and how does it work?
seedBall.answer: A seed ball is an innovative artificial encapsulation method in which plant seeds are coated with clay and organic nutrients to protect them from external factors, raising germination success above 65%. This nature-friendly biotechnological approach protects seeds from risks such as drought and consumption by wildlife, helping them take hold in the soil safely; sprouting with the rain, it accelerates nature's rate of renewal.

sourcing.question: Where are the seeds sourced from?
sourcing.answer: All seeds are sourced in cooperation with the Regional Forestry Directorates. In line with the principles of preserving biodiversity and sustainability, the collection date, genetic origin, and taxonomic (species) information of every seed lot is recorded using blockchain technology. Thanks to our end-to-end transparent supply chain, our customers can access seed ID cards and certification data at any time.

droneEfficiency.question: How efficient is drone planting?
droneEfficiency.answer: By distributing more than 200 seeds in a single flight, it offers 10 times the speed and high cost-efficiency compared to traditional methods. Thanks to GPS-precise coordinates, it provides high accessibility to steep and post-fire damaged areas that human feet cannot reach; with centimetric precision it maximizes resource efficiency while creating a sustainable environmental impact with a minimal carbon footprint.

tracking.question: How can I track the growth of the planted seeds?
tracking.answer: With annual periodic drone flights, the area is rescanned and growth data is processed into your corporate dashboard. Individual users can access area imagery via the QR code on their digital certificate. Corporate partners access real-time data through the API.

certificate.question: What is the carbon certificate valid for?
certificate.answer: The certificates can be used in ESG reports, GRI and CDP submissions, and corporate sustainability statements. All reforestation and carbon sink projects are carried out in coordination with the Regional Directorates of the General Directorate of Forestry (OGM), in accordance with legal and scientific infrastructure; we provide a 100% verifiable monitoring chain.

minOrder.question: Is there a minimum order quantity?
minOrder.answer: There is a starting limit of a minimum of 10 seeds for individual users and a minimum of 1,000 seeds for corporate partners. Shipping is free on individual orders of 50 seeds and above. Quote-based pricing is applied for corporate projects.

b2bIntegration.question: How does B2B corporate integration work?
b2bIntegration.answer: Our corporate panel includes modules such as employee list upload, automatic PDF certificate generation, an e-commerce "add seeds to cart" integration, and an ESG reporting API. A dedicated account manager is assigned and customization is carried out according to the organization's needs.

gift.question: Can I send it as a gift?
gift.answer: Yes — there is a "gift it" option in the individual order flow. The recipient receives the digital certificate by email. When they sign up, the sender automatically earns a seed bonus (our viral growth program).

meta.title: About Us — Science, Technology and Nature
meta.description: A vision born from the 2021 Mediterranean wildfires — a 36+ person family of forest engineers, drone pilots and a software team. The founding story and values of Skytech Green.

hero.title: Science, Technology and Nature. We Bring the Three Together.
hero.subtitle: Skytech Green is a new-generation Eco-Tech platform that combines the fight against the climate crisis with aviation, forestry and modern software.
hero.imageAlt: Skytech Green field team — drone operation

story.paragraph1: After the 2021 Mediterranean forest fires, we saw that drones could rapidly disperse seed balls and reach areas where human footsteps struggle to arrive. We combined three things: scientific foundation + aviation technology + a transparent software infrastructure.
story.paragraph2: Today <brand>Skytech Green</brand> carries out drone reforestation across three regions of Türkiye — answering the ESG goals of corporate partners and the carbon-offset aspirations of individual users.

timeline.subtitle: From an idea after a wildfire to our scale today — the step-by-step growth of Skytech Green.

schema.name: Carbon Neutralization Program
schema.description: GRI/CDP/SASB-compliant carbon footprint calculation to IPCC standards, neutralized through drone reforestation. Integrated into corporate ESG reports.

hero.title: End-to-End Carbon Neutralization for Holdings and Companies
hero.subtitle: We calculate your annual greenhouse gas emissions to international standards, build high-capacity carbon sink areas (bio-carbon ecosystems) with drone technology, and transparently integrate the entire process into your ESG reports.

metrics.subtitle: Every figure is grounded in IPCC standards. Transparent, verifiable, auditable.

perTree.label: CO₂ / Tree / Year
perTree.desc: Average annual carbon dioxide absorption of a tree; varies by species, age and climate.

perHectare.label: CO₂ / ha / Year
perHectare.desc: Per-hectare carbon removal range of young reforestation areas over the first 20 years.

perSquareMeter.label: CO₂ / m² / Year
perSquareMeter.desc: Organic carbon sequestration rate measured in Mediterranean pine forests (2/3 soil, 1/3 biomass).

compliant.label: Compliant
compliant.desc: Our data formats conform to international reporting standards.

validity.question: What are your carbon certificates valid for?
validity.answer: Our certificates can be used in ESG reports, GRI and CDP submissions, and corporate sustainability statements. All reforestation and carbon sink projects carried out by our company are conducted in coordination with the Regional Directorates of the General Directorate of Forestry (OGM), in line with a sound legal and scientific framework.

calculation.question: How is the carbon calculation performed?
calculation.answer: Number of seeds × germination rate = number of trees; number of trees × annual CO₂ absorption per tree × monitoring period = total carbon offset. The per-tree absorption range (10–25 kg/year) and per-hectare removal rates (4.5–40.7 t CO₂/ha/year) are based on the academic sources listed at the bottom of the page; they are updated on a site basis according to species, age and climate.

individual.question: Can I participate as an individual too?
individual.answer: Yes — every user who orders seeds offsets their own carbon footprint. Your digital certificate clearly shows how many kg of CO₂ you have offset.

esg.question: How does ESG integration work?
esg.answer: We automate the data flow by providing API integration between your ESG software and your corporate dashboard. Our system calculates your company's carbon footprint and, accordingly, creates a forest unique to your brand, supported by drone technology.

references.subtitle: Our carbon calculation parameters are based on peer-reviewed academic publications and independent institutional sources.

ref1.text: Average annual CO₂ absorption range per tree — independent carbon accounting compilations and forest management carbon accounting sources.

ref2.text: Per-hectare carbon removal rate of reforestation and nurseries over the first 20 years (4.5–40.7 t CO₂ ha⁻¹ yr⁻¹).

ref3.text: Organic carbon sequestration rate in a Mediterranean pine forest (~550 g CO₂ m⁻² yr⁻¹).

ref4.text: UAV-based precision seeding research on seed ball composition, drop height and germination success.

references.note: Note: Carbon removal values vary by species, age, climate and site conditions. The ranges presented are averages from the scientific literature; in corporate projects they are updated with site-based measurements.

meta.description: Our pilot drone reforestation work underway in Çanakkale, İzmir and Bursa. Interactive map of Türkiye and pilot site details by province.

projectsPage.breadcrumbSubtitle: Our work continues at our pilot sites in Çanakkale, İzmir and Bursa — real drones, real seeds.

map.subtitle: Explore our pilot sites on the map. Hover over the provinces to see the details.
map.emptyProvince: No active projects in this province yet.

list.subtitle: Our pilot work is currently underway in Çanakkale, İzmir and Bursa. As our area grows, new sites will be listed here.

cta.subtitle: We can design a custom project for your company, your municipality or your NGO.

canakkale.desc: Pilot reforestation work coordinated by the General Directorate of Forestry.

izmir.desc: Drone-assisted pilot seeding and field analysis work.

bursa.desc: Pilot site preparations focused on ecosystem restoration.

homeMeta.title: Plant the Future with Seed Balls
homeMeta.description: Carbon-neutral reforestation with drone technology and seed balls. Individual and corporate solutions, measurable impact, transparent supply chain.

cookieConsent.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and anonymously analyze site traffic.
